title: Paw Patrol Christmas Wrapping Paper, 4 Sheet Tag for Gift Wrap, 4 Sheets of Wrapping Paper
features: This product is for 4 sheets of Official Paw Patrol Christmas wrapping paper. The design is a collage of all your favourite Paw Patrol characters - Chase, Skye, Rubble, Marshall and Rocky! It also contains the Official Paw Patrol logo. The wrapping sheets also come with a Marshall gift tag for you to write your special message on the back.

Our fully licensed range of Christmas gift wrap will bring a smile those receiving gifts wrapped in them. We also sell a wide variety of fully licensed Christmas cards, and Christmas gift bags as well!

Great for the Environment: Our products are made of FSC Certified Paper that has passed the highest Environmental Regulation checks. The ribbon attached to the bag can be taken off and re-used in crafts and other gift wrapping designs.

Brought to you by Europe's Number One Licensed Publisher: Every Danilo product is 100% Officially Licensed. This guarantees the product has been approved by the Acts themselves and features the current and most up to date designs
Dimensions of each sheet is 70cm x 50cm
description: We are Europe's Leading Publisher of Licensed Calendars, Greetings Cards, Gift Wrap, Gift Bags and Diaries. A family-run company operating for over 40 years, we publish and sell a huge range of official titles from all your favourite Celebrity, Gaming, Glamour, TV, Film, Lifestyle, Sports & Football team brands. So, no matter if you’re shopping for yourself or for a wonderful card, gift or gift wrap we will have the ideal design for you.
